session.user: Run ty type checker and report results. Command: ty check --project /home/runner/work/erk/erk
session.assistant: I'll run the ty type checker on the project and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ty type checker on project

session.tool_result: All checks passed!
